name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake2
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Lovin' Loaf Angel Food cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients with the low speed setting of a mixer until moistened.
3. Beat on high speed for 2 minutes.
4. Pour batter into an ungreased 8 x 4-inch or 9 x 5-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 28-38 minutes, or until the top cracks appear dry.
6. Allow to cool completely in the pan tipped on its side onto a cooling rack.
7. Remove from the pan.
8. Slice the loaf with the bottom side up.
This recipe makes 8 servings. The cake is 0 calories, less than 1 gram of fat, contains 0 milligrams of cholesterol, and has 230 milligrams of sodium. It only contains 4% fat.
